TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Steve_Alford, title = Steve_Alford, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Steve_Alford} }

S.FORM: Steve Alford sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Steve Alford, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Steve Alford sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Steve Alford, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕte*e al*or* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, s~ɕte*e al*or*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
